caption: An American football game is broadcast on a screen, featuring a match between teams represented by logos including the Atlanta Falcons. The game takes place in a large stadium with a green turf field and red seating areas. Players in white and dark uniforms are positioned on the field, preparing for a play. A scoreboard at the top displays "2nd & 2", the score as "0" for both teams, "EXO", a game clock at "2:30" then "2:29", and a shot clock at ":10". Below the game footage, a separate window shows a man with blonde hair wearing a dark shirt and headphones, reacting with a focused expression. Large yellow text reading "ANDERS" is visible on a red background behind him. As the scene progresses, the players shift their positions on the field, and the game clock ticks down from "2:30" to "2:29".
